sessions.intent: Fix 7 OBP violations + rename identity.getAll to identity.list

before.assumptions: All 7 violations identified in prior analysis are real and fixable without breaking existing tests.
before.risk: Interface changes cascade to all implementations.

sessions.plan: Fix 7 OBP violations + rename identity.getAll → identity.list

sessions.intent: Full 5-pass code analysis of signing/crypto/identity/provider modules

before.assumptions: Coder fixed 7 OBP violations. Analyzing full module set.
before.risk: Large surface area, previous branches had provider return type issues.

sessions.plan: 5-pass analysis: OBP, simplification, readability, behavioral reasoning, deletion test

actions.context: 8 findings: IKeyProvider throws (high), duplication (medium), bare catch (medium)

after.notes: Verdict: fail. Send back to coder.

sessions.intent: Re-review coder's fixes for v1 findings

before.assumptions: Coder addressed top 4 findings. Re-reviewing fix-introduced code for correctness and new issues.
before.risk: Interface change (IKeyProvider) cascades to Ed25519Provider, DefaultIdentityProvider, and 7 test files.

sessions.plan: Verify each fix against original finding. Behavioral reasoning and deletion test on fix-introduced code only.

actions.context: All 4 fixes verified: Data<KeyPair>, generic delegation, ResolveIdentityAsync, narrowed catch. No new issues.

sessions.intent: Test quality analysis of signing/provider/identity/crypto changes

before.assumptions: Codeanalyzer v2 passed. 1795 tests already green. Investigating test quality and coverage gaps.
before.risk: New modules (signing, provider) may have tests that look green but miss critical paths.

sessions.plan: Run tests, collect coverage, analyze test quality: deletion test, weak assertions, missing error-path coverage, PLang test existence

actions.context: Analyzed 97 test methods across 7 test files. Found 6 major coverage gaps and 3 weak assertions.
Wrote test-report.json with 13 findings and coverage data

after.notes: Verdict: needs-fixes. Send back to coder for error-path tests.
